meaning: n.掩蔽处,身避处,掩蔽,保护,庇护所,掩体v.掩蔽,躲避
examples: They provided food and shelter for the poor.
They have dragged themselves thither for shelter.
Migrant birds shelter in the reeds.
There were tens, maybe hundreds, of thousands of us scattered across Dixie looking for shelter.
Two days later, we arrived at a cluster of yurts to shelter from rain.
